temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) The scene opens on a dark, nighttime view of a dense urban cityscape. The camera is angled upwards towards a multi-story residential building with numerous windows. A prominent vertical sign with red Chinese characters (萬安行) and the English word 'KENWOOD' is visible on the building's facade. The street below is dimly lit by a single lamppost. (Storyline: This establishing shot sets the scene, introducing the urban environment where the story will unfold.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A dramatic, percussive musical score begins, building tension.)
(00:02-00:05) The scene cuts to a dark, narrow, and crowded outdoor corridor of a building. The camera follows a group of people, all dressed in dark suits, as they walk away from the camera. The corridor is dimly lit by overhead lights, casting long shadows. (Storyline: This shot introduces a group of characters, likely a gang or criminal crew, moving with purpose through a tense environment, advancing the plot.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic, orchestral score continues, heightening the sense of impending action.)
